NOTICE OF COURT HEARING (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Dec-26-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Temporary Restraining Order was issued on December 11, 2012. There is no proof that it has been served and there is no request for a reiussuance. The request for a protection order is dismissed for failure to prosecute or serve.
